categories.name: success_via_semantic_search
categories.evidence: Agent queried NLS with 'function that validates email format before sending welcome message' and found lib/comms_helpers.py. Keyword search for 'email validation' returned 40+ irrelevant results. search_calls_nls=2, has_semantic_search=true.

annotations.notes: Exemplar: semantic search found a non-obviously named file that keyword search would have missed.
